name: Orange, Pine Nut and Green Bean Salad
recipeInstructions:
Preparation: top and tail the French beans.
Divide the chicory head into leaves.
1. Peel the oranges and cut them into segments, over a bowl to catch the juice. Cook the beans in boiling water for 2 minutes. Drain and refresh under cold running water.
2. Place orange segments, beans, radishes, chicory leaves, and pine nuts in a salad bowl.
3. Whisk together the dressing ingredients with the reserved orange juice, pour over the salad and toss gently. Serve with Italian olive oil bread, such as ciabatta and focaccia.
Calories: 112 per serving
Protein: 2g
Carbohydrate: 9g
Fat: 8g (high)
Saturated fat: 1g (medium)
Added sugar: none
Fibre: 4g (high)
Salt: 0.8g (high)
